Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff?S Complaint Or In The Alternative Immediately Stay The Action Pending Plaintiff?S Retention Of Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint Or In The Alternative Immediately Stay The Action Pending Plaintiff'S Retention Of Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Continued To May-10-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. FRANK S. MOORE, Esq. of Law Office of Frank S. Moore (Tel: 415-292-6091) for plaintiff 2P1, LLC dba Stay Fresh Packaging;
Atty. ROBERT M. BODZIN, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendant The Barnabas Team.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE BARNABAS TEAM LLP's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint Or In The Alternative Immediately Stay The Action Pending Plaintiff's Retention Of Counsel.

Matter discussed. Based on new counsel having just substituted in for plaintiff, the Court grants a continuance of today's hearing to May 10, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The Court requests that if the parties reach a settlement that they please inform Dept. 302 as soon as possible.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Patricia Rosenberg, Esq. (415.788.6330; prosenberg@hnattorneys.com) of Haas Najarian, LLP, Moving Party.
Gerald Gersovitz (415.971.0010; gerry.gersovitz@gmail.com) on behalf of Plaintiff in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF 2P1, LLC DBA STAY FRESH PACKAGING is GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
